_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct learning needs assessments and identify requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.525), LS-T-006 (LS, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.312). Shared vocabulary: [learning]. DCWF-only terms [assessments, conduct, identify, needs, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [adult, blended, delivery, design, instructional, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.878, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 7-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (61.4%). The model interprets "Conduct learning needs assessments and identify requirements." as logically implying aspects of "Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, in" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 > STS 0.312 (gap +0.259). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [learning] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [learning]. DCWF-only: [assessments, conduct, identify, needs, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [adult, blended, delivery, design, instructional, knowledge].
